name: Jewel Match Origins 3 - Camelot Castle Collector's Edition
short_description: Embark on a regal journey with the latest addition to the glittering world of Jewel Match games! Unleash your inner architect as you solve match-3 puzzles and unlock the power to build and design the fabled Camelot Castle. The journey awaits, noble puzzler!
detailed_description:
Embark on a regal journey with the latest addition to the glittering world of Jewel Match games! Unleash your inner architect as you solve match-3 puzzles and unlock the power to build and design the fabled Camelot Castle. Harness the magic of gems to unlock new castle elements and watch in awe as your creation evolves from a mere foundation to a majestic fortress fit for royalty.

Explore expansive levels full of treasures waiting to be discovered. Take part in bonus mini-games with hidden object scenes and puzzles to gain additional resources. Browse through a wide variety of items available for purchase in the store.

Set off on an exciting Match-3 journey like never before: Will you be the architect of destiny and build the most splendid castle the realm has ever seen? The journey awaits, noble puzzler!

- Explore a total of 200 huge levels!
- Journey through 40 additional bonus levels that introduce new gameplay elements!
- Choose from three unique game modes: Timed, Relaxed and Limited Moves!
- Customize your experience with three difficulty levels: Normal, Advanced and Extreme.
- Improve your gameplay by purchasing various upgrades and powerful boosts in the in-game store.
- Enjoy replayable mini-games with addictive puzzles and compelling 'find the difference' challenges.
